step_by_step_thinking: I agree with agent1's selection because the nucleus caudalis serves as the main relay station where nociceptive inputs converge after being processed by spinothalamic tracts. It plays an essential role in both transmitting pain sensations and regulating their perception via connections within the central nervous system.
